Stay healthy by using a full array of fitness apps, then back up your data on Beantech Watch app. Send and receive phone calls, texts and emails on the Watch. Load and store over 1000 songs in the music Vault. Beantech Engage Plus works with both iPhone and Android phones. Bit Watch app available on Apple app store and Google play store at No additional cost. Polished Silver with Brown Calfskin Leather strap.
features: FUNCTION - full function smart watch in a Classic design. Ips touch screen for bright clear viewing and interfacing with pre-loaded apps. Works with iPhone or Android.
COMMUNICATIONS - send and receive phone calls, texts and email. Receives notifications from phone apps.
FITNESS- count daily steps, check your heart rate, monitor your sleep patterns and upload to Bit watch app to keep track. Compare to daily goals.
MUSIC VAULT - 8G of on board storage allows you to load and store over 1000 songs on the watch, then take them with you without your phone!
BIT WATCH APP - interfaces with Bit watch app to allow communications, sync time and store fitness data. Bit watch app is available in Apple app store and Google play store at no additional cost.
COMPATIBILITY - iPhone - iOS 7.1 or higher and model 5S or newer. Android phones - Android 4.4 or higher.

features: 【Smart Watch for Men and Women】Features a 1.3-inch TFT-LCD full touch screen with a simple and vivid interface. 5 levels of brightness are available so you can easily view the screen in sunlight, and it will auto adjust brightness at night with night mode on. The screen lights up automatically when you lift and turn your wrist. Skin-friendly and soft bands fit different wrist sizes.

【All Day Activity Tracking】Supports 14 sports including walking, running, cycling, yoga, swimming and more. Accurately record all-day activities such as steps, distance, calories burned, miles walked, active minutes. Connect your GPS on your smartphone to see your real-time pace and distance during your outdoor activities and record your workout route map in the app.

Auto-track analyze your sleep quality(deep sleep, light sleep and wake up time) to help you get a better understanding of your health and and make reasonable adjustment on your lifestyle.

Also there are 14 dials in the dial gallery in our custom app, you can go download and install them to your watch at any time, and you can also choose a photo from your phone album as the background of your watch.

reviews.title: My daughter is obsessed with the watch
reviews.text: This is a perfect alternative of a smart watch. I didn't want to get a real smart watch for my daughter because they are so expensive but she kept insisting on it. Saw this kids watch the other day and bought. She thinks it's an apple watch Haha. She loved it and I'm so happy.

reviews.title: She Loves It!
reviews.text: Picture and video is clear and the games and other things on it are fun. This will also help children to learn time and definitely a good beginners watch for a kid. She figured out how to use many of the features without my help. Lots of great features. She likes to set her alarm clock every morning. This is a great first watch and a perfect gift.

reviews.title: It was ok.
reviews.text:
It's very cute. But let's talk about it.
The Camara was a bit blurry.
Never tried the music option so I don't know.
The pedometer would mark a step even when just moving hands so that wasn't accurate.
We had some trouble setting the alarm clock and set chores.
And the games were cute and fun but killed the battery fast.
I guess I was hopping too much out of this.
It was a gift for my daughter since her timex watch went out. But unfortunately it doesn't have a connect to phone feature where she could receive messages when I'm out and about running errands or late to pick her up from school for that matter. The battery didn't last long and even though my girl liked it, it wasn't too functional for what we needed it for. As I was going to return it my dog had other plans. So yeah the watch didn't survived it's attacker. So it's not dog proofed. Lol 😂

reviews.title: Great bands

reviews.title: Easier to set-up than previous bands
reviews.text:
I have really struggled getting replacement bands in place in the past. I had this one switched over in a matter of minutes. The lacy look makes it less apparent that the band is vinyl and the dark colors help to hide stains. I have bad metal allergies nd was a bit afraid of what would happen with the clasp given it is metal and has some contact with my skin. Been wearing this since December and the only time I have issues with a rash was when I had the watch fastened too tightly to my wrist. I believe this was from trapped sweat and moisture and not a metal allergy reaction.
Extra great deal in that you get three bands. I don't foresee a need to buy more bands for at least a year.

description:
Protect your Investment
Daily use of your mobile device can cause unsightly scratches, dents, and other unwanted damage. Within a few months, the screen will be difficult to read; the device will decrease in resale value and be embarrassing to show other people. Lower-quality disposable screen protectors seem like a temporary solution for keeping your device looking brand new; though they need constant replacements.
The Only Screen Protector You'll Need
With this problem in mind the founders of Skinomi set out to create a screen protector that's tough, reliable, and long-lasting. Their solution was the Skinomi TechSkin.
Made of a thermoplastic urethane film that is designed to resist abrasion, the TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with the Sony Smartwatch provides impact absorbing military-grade protection for your device. The protector is UV resistant, HD Clear, and goes on invisible. A smooth texture and feel makes it easy to navigate your device as if there was nothing applied. The flexible high-grade film is formulated to be
"self-healing"
which makes it able to stretch, absorb, and even repair scratches and impact damage.
Lifetime Guarantee

The anti-bubble installation process is easy and error-proof. Protect your possessions and never worry about having to replace that old screen protector again.

reviews.title: 5-star product!
reviews.text: You have to love it when a product, even something as simple as a thin piece of plastic, outperforms your expectations. Packaged extremely well with everything you'd possibly need, I had my watch cleaned, prepped and completed in minutes. I will use the Skinomi brand for my iPad, Kindle Fire and Samsung Galaxy S III as soon as their old (non-Skinomi) screen protectors need replacement.

reviews.title: Really impressed
reviews.text: Got this for my Sony LiveView and while I was shocked to see that the installation process was more than other screen protectors (ie cell phone screen protectors), installation was pretty simple. After it dries, you can't even tell a screen protector is on!

reviews.title: It's soft
reviews.text:
Like another reviewer had mentioned, they are soft. I used a rubber squeegee that I've used on countless other screen savers, and it actually damaged the skin. It has permanent "bubbles" (more like dents) in it that will not go away. Other than that, the fit is perfect. And the skin comes very nicely packaged with everything you could ever need, including a bottle of soapy water for the application.

The attention to detail by Skinomi is second to none. The company gets five stars, but I've got to deduct one for the soft material. Skinomi did include a squeegee, but it's too big for use with this skin. Had I cut it down to size and used it, I may not have "dents" now.

reviews.title: This is just a 22mm silicone watch strap, ignore the smartwatch stuff if you're using a real watch.
reviews.text:
Recently Amazon had a sale on a watch I like, a Seiko Solar 42mm faced 22mm lug analog watch. A real watch, that tells time, day, date and that's all, what we in the watch enthusiast world like to call a "tool watch". Because it's a tool for telling time. Period. I"m a semi-retired IT engineer and have more than enough screens in my life, I don't need nor want one in place of a real watch too. This watch runs for 10 months on a full charge from a light source and never needs a battery replacement, eat your heart out 3 day smartwatches.

I decided being as the watch is black with a sort of stencil font on the face indices that I'd take a chance on this band and accessorize it with a military-looking Army Green silicone band -- Because I do not wear permeable (leather, nylon, canvas, cloth, etc.) watch straps I decided an Army Green silicone band was the way to go with the new watch and put the canvas band that came on it in a drawer. I don't wear NATO straps either, first because they're permeable nylon (permeable is a no-no for me) and secondly because to me they look like someone tried to tie their watch on their wrist with a chunk of old seat belt.

This band fits on a 22mm lug's spring-bar perfectly. It's very easy and fast to remove or replace too. I've tried to get it to let go of the spring-bar "by accident" and it's on there very solidly, at least as solid as any other system. I have a rather large 8" wrist and there's room to spare on the band. It's also very quick and easy to remove or replace, I wish more bands would use this kind of system. I wish more bands came in this length too, it's hard fro me to find one that fits without strangling my hand.

The "keepers", the little loops that hold the tongue of the strap in place where it emerges from the buckle, have lugs on them that fit in the sizing slots on the band. That's a GREAT extra feature because those keepers tend to wander up and down the watchband without those lugs to hold them in place. This can cause either the tongue of the band or the keeper to snag on something which can break the band or the keeper loop. No problem with this band, the lugs on the keepers stabilize them exactly where you put them. This is something that is not shown nor addressed in the product description and very much should be. It's a deciding factor for me and I might have returned the watchstrap if it didn't have those lugs on the keepers.

The band is about the thickness you'd expect and has no discernible taper from lug to buckle. Being silicone it weighs very little and does not appreciably add to the weight of the watch and strap combo. It's just a good, plain, non-reactive, non-absorbent, military looking watchstrap. That will fit on any watch, smart or otherwise, with a 22mm lug. I don't know if I'd use this strap on an Omega or a Rolex, mostly because those are much heavier watches than the one I use the strap on. It's a little plain for a multi-thousand dollar plus watch too, I think there are better choices. But for a watch I got at less than half price and intend to wear every day to save my nicer watches the wear, tear and scratches that come with that kind of use ... This band works perfectly.

The only complaint I have with it is that I could do without the little "smart watch" triangles, of which there are three. One on the buckle and one near each lug attachment. But that's a very, very minor issue and not worth taking a star off my review over. I knew they were there when I ordered it and this is a style thing not a failure in design and materials thing. This particular watch that I'm using this band on has a very similar little triangle on the bezel above the 12 o'clock indices so it looks like the strap was made for the watch ... sort of. Actually now that I look at it some more, it looks quite natural.

We'll see how long it lasts, I just got it. If it has an unreasonably short service life I'll come back here and add an edit to this review. If you don't see that addition, what I say here stands current.

Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.

1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. 【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. reviews.title: Very limited life span
reviews.text: Too costly for what is now a disposable watch.  Within about 3 months the watch started randomly sending two vibrating signals like it was trying to make a notification of some sort.  Second vibration came with a short screen request to shut down the watch.  Side button quit working after about a month but was not an issue.  Still kept accurate time, fairly good step counts, and notifications of incoming texts and phone calls.  Just can’t stand the frequent and random vibrating. Unlike other commenters my watches battery life was very good.

I don't like sleeping with it on it's uncomfortable not used to sleeping with any kind of jewelry I did use it a few days and checked my sleep and it seemed to give me the same answer every time so I don't know if that's very accurate either? I realize these gadgets are not accurate however I'm just trying to find a way to motivate myself to move around more and I refuse to pay over $100 for one of these smart watches so I got this one on a lightning deal.

reviews.title: Fun toy "smart watch"
reviews.text: This is a toy smart watch (not one you can pair and operate as a real smart watch), but it is a fully functioning touchscreen device with LOTS of fun features and activities built in. It's loaded with games and nursery songs and functions (including selfie and regular camera), lots of things to keep a little one busy and entertained. The listing says it's suitable for ages 3 - 10, but I suspect a lot of children over, say, age 7 may kind of sneer at it for not being a real smart watch. But younger ones will find a lot of fun things to play with.

reviews.title: Fun for the Kiddos
reviews.text: Kids these days like technology, and of course they would like a smart watch like their parents' wear. This is a watch that has games,a dual camera, flashlight and much more. Battery charges quickly and last a long time.

reviews.title: the greatest kids watch!
reviews.text: This is by far the greatest kids watch!! The touchscreen works easily and smoothly. There are games, music, audiobooks, camera, video camera, funny filters, fun backgrounds, a flashlight, etc. My daughter LOVES it! I can not recommend this watch enough. HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!!

reviews.title: This watch has so many bells and whistles!
reviews.text: This watch has games, audio books, a camera and so many other bells and whistles that keeps the young one entertained as well as a tool to help teach.  For the money you can't beat it!

reviews.title: doesn't stay on securely
reviews.text: I've purchased one of these in the past and liked it, but the gold color faded so I l reordered another it in black. However, this time, one side kept disconnecting and the attachment site looked defective compared to the other side causing me to almost lose my Fitbit twice. Luckily, I was indoors and heard it drop. I will return it and try a different brand as I fear I will encounter this issue again if I simply replace it.  This style is nice because it's easy to put on and off even with a single hand as opposed to the type of bracelet that comes with the Fitbit.

reviews.title: Worried the magnet will damage device
reviews.text: I wanted a band that would have more variability in fit, and I liked the color, so I ordered this.  It is, indeed, compatible with the Fitbit Sense and I enjoyed it for several days until I had to charge my Sense.  I then discovered that the magnet was so strong that I had difficulty keeping it off the back of my device long enough to get the charger on.  I was worried that strong magnet might damage the circuits and contacted FitBit for their opinion.  They weren't sure, but pointed out that they do have a hook-and-loop wristband in-house that is available.  Since I was also having trouble with the edges of the VNCAS band getting caught on my wool shawl and anything else fuzzy I wore, I decided to ditch it for the FitBit brand option.  Sorry, but I can't recommend this one.

reviews.title: Not Well Made😳
reviews.text: Initially when I bought this watch band, I thought it was nice, solid and seemed to be well made. I've been wearing it just a little over 2 months now and there's some sharp little burrs that have now showed up on the watch band itself and the edges of the other parts are now seeming to be sharp as well and keep getting hung up on my clothing and have also scratched my boyfriend several times. The finish is wearing off on the backside of the magnet connector area so now it looks very tarnished. I do wear it everyday all day long, but I don't feel after such a short period of time it should look so bad and have these sharp edges now. Unfortunately it's past my return window so I'm going to have to just throw it away and get another one. Such a shame because I really like the magnetic band and the color. I'm a little bit leery about buying another similar style for fear that the same thing will happen again. 😳

reviews.title: Cute but it snags
reviews.text: It snags on everything. Ugh. So I can't wear it with nice blouses or sweaters it gets caught and causes holes, runs, etc. Otherwise I love it.

reviews.title: Like the fact that it's magnetic
reviews.text: Be careful since it's magnetic it may stick to your silverware or metal objects
